persona: Bay Area tech founder / staff design-engineer
authority_axis: fit-to-builder x actionable depth — NOT breadth, age, or citation-count
prefers: credibility with technical peers over academic completeness
ship-speed: a rule you can apply this week beats a survey of the field
primary practitioner sources over second-hand retellings
default_tiebreak: when two sources cover the SAME layer, prefer the one written FOR builders with copy-pasteable specifics (the Refactoring-UI-over-Williams call). Name the theory source as the transferable backstop, do not rank it above.
note: This is the default audience applied when an authority query names none. It encodes CF-075: rank by who is reading and what they must DO, never by prestige. Edit this file to retune the persona; authority-guard reads it at runtime.
